chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Present: Shamsuddin Abbasi, J. Agha Faisal, J. CP D 760 of 2023: Naseer Ahmed Soomro vs. Government of Sindh & others. For the Petitioner: Mr. Ashfaq Hussain Abro, Advocate. For Respondents: Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Additional Advocate General along with Mr. Abdul Waris Bhutto, Asstt. A.G. Date of hearing: 08.05.2024. Date of order: 08.05.2024. ORDER Agha Faisal, J. The petitioner seeks regularization of his service on humanitarian grounds. At the very onset learned counsel was confronted with the maintainability hereof in view of the recent judgment of the Supreme Court in VC Agriculture University. Learned counsel remained unable to satisfy the court. In view of mutatis mutandis application of the binding ratio enunciated by the Supreme Court as aforesaid, this petition is found to be misconceived, hence, dismissed. Judge Judge Per Syed Mansoor Ali Shah J in Vice Chancellor Agriculture University Peshawar & Others vs. Muhammad Shafiq& Others (Civil Petition 2270 of 2019) and connected matters; yet unreported judgment dated 17.01.2024.
